description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for CI of mc_rtc that runs on every push to all branches except for specific paths and on all pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and test mc_rtc on ubuntu-22.04 and windows-latest with various compilers and build types. It also includes steps for cleaning up the environment, cloning and bootstrapping the superbuild, installing dependencies, building and testing mc_rtc, and uploading documentation.
